name: X-Golf Libertyville
about: X-Golf Libertyville is an indoor golf facility featuring seven state-of-the-art golf simulators. The venue offers a comprehensive experience combining golf simulation, a full-service bar, and a lounge. Pricing is per hour per simulator, accommodating up to six people per bay, making it suitable for both individual play and group events. It is an ideal destination for year-round golf, corporate outings, private parties, and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism with advanced simulator technology
Comprehensive food and beverage service including craft beer and full liquor
Flexible and accommodating space for up to 120 guests for events
Variety of simulator hours and pricing to fit different schedules and budgets
Opportunity for competitive play through leagues and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with food and beverage packages available.
Full bar with craft beer and liquor.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulator system combining camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rental is available on-site. Simulators have their own automatic tees.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen offering food and beverage packages. No information on outside food/drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about 1 hour for an individual to play 18 holes. With more players, allow approximately 1 hour per person.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Libertyville welcomes children of all ages.
